sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَتِ الْهَوَاتِفُ الذَّكِيَّةُ جُزْءًا أَسَاسِيًّا مِنْ حَيَاتِنَا الْيَوْمِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Pametni telefoni su postali osnovni dio našeg svakodnevnog života.
sentences.translationEn: Smartphones have become an essential part of our daily lives.

sentences.arabic: نَسْتَخْدِمُ هَذِهِ الْأَجْهِزَةَ لِلتَّوَاصُلِ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ وَالْعَائِلَةِ بِسُهُولَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Koristimo ove uređaje za lakšu komunikaciju s prijateljima i porodicom.
sentences.translationEn: We use these devices to communicate with friends and family easily.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا يُمْكِنُنَا الْبَحْثُ عَنِ الْمَعْلُومَاتِ وَتَحْمِيلُ التَّطْبِيقَاتِ الْمُفِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Također možemo tražiti informacije i preuzimati korisne aplikacije.
sentences.translationEn: We can also search for information and download useful applications.

sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُنَا التِّكْنُولُوجِيَا الْحَدِيثَةُ فِي تَوْفِيرِ الْوَقْتِ وَالْجُهْدِ.
sentences.translation: Moderna tehnologija nam pomaže u uštedi vremena i truda.
sentences.translationEn: Modern technology helps us save time and effort.
